seoTitle: Clinton vs Clovelly Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Clinton and Clovelly Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Clinton vs Clovelly Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clinton and Clovelly Park.
heading: Clinton vs Clovelly Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clinton, South Australia and Clovelly Park, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clinton has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Clovelly Park (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clinton or Clovelly Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clinton has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Clovelly Park scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clinton scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Clovelly Park scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clinton or Clovelly Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clinton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
